saved_test.name: Verb to Be: Negatives — Opus 4.6 V3 Questions Test
saved_test.description: Practice set for negative forms of verb to be: am not, is not, are not, contractions isn't / aren't, subject-verb agreement, tag questions, litotes, formal register, and literary imperatives across A1–C2.
